sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108623" key="u(pokrisi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπο-κρῐσία</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπο-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, rarer form for <sense id="n108623.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑπόκρισις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0551.tlg009.perseus-grc1:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.289</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
